ohtani.title: Betts, Ohtani lead Dodgers in 4-3 win over Twins
ohtani.blurb: Mookie Betts hits his 300th career home run and Shohei Ohtani strikes out eight in the Dodgers' 4-3 win over the Twins

imanaga.title: Dansby Swanson's four RBIs aids Cubs' win
imanaga.blurb: Dansby Swanson collects four RBIs in the Cubs' 10-5 victory over the Mets

suzuki.title: Dansby Swanson's four RBIs aids Cubs' win
suzuki.blurb: Dansby Swanson collects four RBIs in the Cubs' 10-5 victory over the Mets

yoshida.title: Caleb Durbin's home run propels Red Sox past Yankees
yoshida.blurb: Caleb Durbin clubs a two-run homer and Connelly Early strikes out nine to propel the Red Sox past the Yankees, 6-3

okamoto.title: Langford, Pederson lead Rangers to 6-5 win
okamoto.blurb: Wyatt Langford's three-run home run and a leadoff homer from Joc Pederson leads the Rangers to a 6-5 win over the Blue Jays

murakami.title: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in White Sox win
murakami.blurb: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in the 10th inning and Rikuu Nishida collects his first RBI in the White Sox 4-3 win over the Tigers

matsui.title: Manny Machado walks it off in Padres' 7-6 win
matsui.blurb: Fernando Tatis Jr. hits a game-tying homer and Manny Machado hits a walk-off single in the Padres' 7-6 win over the Braves
